meta.title: SpaceX BFS update! Will the wings fold? Why?
meta.description:
SpaceX will be updating us all about the BFR/BFS on Monday, September 17th! Meanwhile, speculation is going wild including why there might be folding wings on the new BFR! So let's talk about why and talk all about what we can expect at Monday's announcement.

https://twitter.com/SpaceX/status/1040397262248005632
